mechanism: Curcuminoids modulate NF-kB, COX-2, and cytokine signaling; bioavailability is low without formulation enhancement (for example piperine or phospholipid complexes).
safetyNotes: Usually well tolerated at culinary intake; supplemental doses may cause dyspepsia or diarrhea. Use caution with anticoagulation and gallbladder disease.
